title: Palantir Technologies Q4 2024 Earnings: AI Drives Strong Growth
text: Palantir's stock surged approximately 23% in after-hours trading following the release of fourth-quarter 2024 results and 2025 guidance, reaching $133.99 per share. The company delivered impressive financial performance with revenue of $828 million, up 36% year-over-year, surpassing Wall Street's expectation of 28% growth. Adjusted EPS was $0.14, representing a 75% increase and crushing the analyst consensus of 38%. Adjusted operating income reached $373 million, up 78% year-over-year, and adjusted free cash flow hit $517 million, up 70% year-over-year. The company's commercial business showed particularly strong momentum with U.S. commercial revenue jumping 64% year-over-year to $214 million and U.S. commercial customer count surging 73%. Total customer count increased 43% and the company closed 129 deals exceeding $1 million in value. Management projected robust growth for the full year with revenue guidance of $3.741-3.757 billion, implying 31% year-over-year growth and exceeding Wall Street's $3.53 billion estimate. Adjusted operating income growth was projected at 38-39%, and U.S. commercial revenue expected to exceed $1.079 billion, up at least 54%. CEO Alex Karp characterized the company as being in the earliest stages of an AI revolution, comparing Palantir to a software juggernaut with both incumbent scale and startup agility.
